channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: NASA Unveils 1st Earth Photos From Artemis II: ‘You Look Beautiful.’ - The New York Times
item.description:
1. NASA Unveils 1st Earth Photos From Artemis II: ‘You Look Beautiful.’  The New York Times

item.title: Astronomers Just Found a “Forbidden” Giant Planet Orbiting a Tiny Star, and Its Atmosphere Is Rewriting Planet Formation Theories - The Daily Galaxy
item.description:

item.title: Five things Juice has revealed about Comet 3I/ATLAS - European Space Agency
item.description:
1. Five things Juice has revealed about Comet 3I/ATLAS  European Space Agency

  4. New Deep-Space Color Image And Revolutionary Insight About Interstellar Comet 3I/ATLAS From Jupiter-Bound JUICE Mission  IFLScience
  5. The more 3I/ATLAS is observed, the stranger it becomes. It now measures 2.6 km and its composition baffles even the experts  ecoticias.com
